title: JOYIN 100 pcs Glow Sticks Bulk 8"(20cm), Glowsticks – Party Accessories for Bracelets and Necklaces, Accessories, Easter, Christmas, Halloween Party Supplies Pack
features: SUPER VALUE PACK. Our glow stick pack comes with a total of 100 Glow sticks, 7 colors, 8” long each, 100 bracelets connectors. Our glow sticks are ultra bright upon activation, and it will glow up to 6 hrs to ensure you could enjoy the whole night party.

EASY TO USE. Our glow sticks are easy to use, you simply need to gently press down on the glowstick's center in a motion similar to breaking a pencil in half. The vial will then be broken as a result, allowing the chemicals to combine and creating the glow. Perfect for indoor or outdoor use.

PERFECT DECOR. These glow sticks party packs are perfect for celebrating a public holiday like Halloween, New Year's, Easter, or the Fourth of July, or your private birthday celebration, pool party, or wedding.
CHILD SAFE. Our Neon Sticks are designed with strong nontoxic and non leaking materials to ensure your kids are safe when they are playing with them.

EXCEPTIONAL CARE: We're big on the little things. That's why customer safety and satisfaction are at the heart of everything we do. Contact us if products don't meet your expectations. We look forward to ensuring every moment brings you joy.
